titleStmt.title: SII 25.294: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 294. (A.R. No. 294 of 1908.) TIRUKKAḶITTAṬṬAI, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the central shrine in the Vēdapurīśvara temple.
This record commences with the praśasti, Tirumaṉṉi-vaḷara-iru-nīlamaḍandaiyum, etc., of the king.
It furnishes the details of date viz., regnal year 8, Kuṁbha, Thursday, and Mūla-nakshatra.

It refers a deed executed by the mahāsabhai of Vembaṟṟūr alias Śōḻamāttāṇḍach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Maṇṇi-nāḍu in Rājēndraśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu to the Chaṇḍēśvaradēva, the mūlabhṛitya of the temple of Śrīkuḍittittai-Paramasvāmi of the village. It states that the sabhai received 50 kāśu from the latter in order to consecrate an image of Āḍavaḷār (Naṭarāja) in the Sāttaṉār Naḍuvil-tirumuṟṟam at Kīḻaichchēri and granted the remission of taxes like siddhāya, pañchavāram, ūriḍuvari, chēri-iḍuvāy etc., The interest on the amount received and the taxes were agreed to be paid by the sabhai. The bhōgam from out of these lands were made over to the deity for the purpose of food-offerings and for the requirements of the priest. The sabhai and the śrīkāryam-cheyvārgaḷ were not allowed to collect taxes on these lands as the same was granted for the enjoyment as adēyam. This order (ōlai) was recorded by Kaḍigai Madhyasthan Nambipirān Śaṅkaranārāyaṇan alias Mūlapariḍai Brahmapriyan and attested by a number of persons residing in the different quarters (chēris) of the village Vēmbaṟṟūṟ. The names of different cheris are mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭan=teyum poṟcayappāvaiyum cīrttaṉic celviyum taṉperun=teviyarāki Iṉpuṟu neṭutuyillūḻiyuḷ Iṭatuṟaināṭum tuṭarvaṉavelippaṭarvaṉavāciyum cuḷḷi cūḻ matiṟkkoḷḷip pākkaiyum naṇṇaṟk karuṇmuraṇ maṇṇaik kaṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻattaracar tammuṭiyumāṅkavar teviyar roṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavar pakkalt teṉṉavaṉ vaitta [ cun=taramu] ṭiyum In=tiraṉāramum teṇticai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭai keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyil cūṭum kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiyum caṅkatir velaittol peru
ṅkāval paḻan=tivum ceruvi ciṉavil Irupatorukālaraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmevaruñcān=ti maṟṟivaraṇaṅkaruti Iruttiya cempoṟṟirut takumuṭiyum māpperun=taṇṭāṟkkoṇṭa kopparakecari panmarāṉa śrī rājentracoḻa devaṟku yāṇṭu 8 Āvatu Irājentrasiṅhavaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇi nāṭṭu brahmadeyam vempaṟṟūrāṉa śrī coḻamāttāṇṭac caturvveti maṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom Ivvāṭṭai kumbhanāyaṟṟu viyāḻakkiḻamai peṟṟa mulattu nāṉṟu pakal nammūr maṇṭapattey kūṭṭa kuṟaivaṟakkūṭi Irun=tu paṇi paṇiyāl paṇittu nammūr śrī kuṭittiṭṭai Initeḻan=taruḷi Irun=ta paramasvāmikku mulabhratyarāṉa caṇḍeśvara devar pakkal Isabhaiyom Eṅkaḷ kiḻaicceri cāttanār naṭuvil tirumuṟṟattukku Āṭavalārai Eḻun=taruḷuvikka veṇ Iṟaiteṟṟu kiḻaiccerip perumakkaḷ vara Āṭavalārai E
ḻun=taruḷuvippataṟkku vicattukkāka koṇṭa kācu Aimpatu Ikkācu Aimpatum Ivar pakkal sabhaiyom koṇṭu Idevar (ni)nilam Ivvūrkkiḻ piṭākai sarasvati vatikku kiḻakku śrī Arumoḻiteva vāykkālukku vaṭakku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu meṟkku niṉṟum Iraṇṭām caturattu paḻampaṭi nilam Arai raiyiṉāl Ulakaḷan=taruḷinapaṭi Araiye nāṉ māvarai meṟkkaṭaiyap paḻampaṭi nilam Araikkālināl Ulakaḷan=taruḷinamaṭi nilam mummāvarai Araikkāṇikkum Ivvaṟālpacāna mutal can=tirādityaval Iṉ nilattukku veṇṭum sittāyamum pañcavārame Ūriṭuvariyum ceri Iṭuvāyum maṟṟum Eppeṟppaṭṭa cilavarikaḷum veṭṭi vetiṉaiyum sabhaiyome Ikkācu Aimpatukkum palicai cekkuttu Iṟuttuk kuṭuttatu Idevarai Inṉilamum māvaraiye Araikkāṇiyum Adeyame Aṉupavippikka kaṭavo
m mākavum Innilattil bhokam Itdevarkku tiruamutukkum tiruvārātiṉai cevāṉukkum Allatu sabhaiyomum śrīkāryyam ceyvārkaḷum Itdevar nilaṅkaḷil Iṟai nilam tiṭṭikkoḷḷapperutomākavum Ip paricu Irukālāvatum Ivaimpatu kācum koṇṭu palicaicekutti Iṉṉilam Ulakaḷan=taruḷinapaṭi mummāvaraiye Araikkāṇiyum sabhaiyom Iṟaiyiṟukkac cantrādityaval Adeyame Aṉubhavikkap peṟuvārāka Ippariceye yeḻutikkuṭuttom Inṉilattukku kiḻpāṟkkellai It devar Iṟai nilattu meṟkkum teṉpāṟkkellai kaṇṇāṟṟukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkkellai Itdevar Ateya nilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkkellai kaṇṇāṟṟukkut teṟkum Āka Icaitta peruṉāṉ kellaiyilum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam paḻampaṭi Araikkālināl Ulakaḷan=taruḷinapaṭi mummāvaraiye Araikkāṇiyum sabhaiyom koṇṭa
Ivaimpatu kācukkum palicai cekuttu Ivvāṇṭai pacāna mutal sabhaiyome Eppeṟppaṭṭa varikaḷum Iṟukka cantrādityavaṟ Adeyame Anubhavikkap peṟuvārāka vum Itaṟṟi sanattu muṉpu niṟkkilum nillāviṭilu Itdevarkanmikaḷe tāṅkaveṇṭum kaḷattu tāṅkaḷ veṇṭum pon manṟi Iṟuppittum Innilam Adeyame Anubhavikkap peṟuvārāka Ipparicu Eḻutikkuṭuttom Iśrī kuṭittiṭṭai Initeḻun=taruḷi Irun=ta paramasvāmikku mulabhrityarāna caṇḍeśvaradevaṟkku coḻamāttāṇṭa caturvvetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom Isabhaiyil Irun=tu Ipparicu Eḻutikkuṭukkap paṇittar rājarājacceri Iruṅkaṇṭi sarvvakritu kramavittunup cananātaceri Irāyūr nākatāpa kramavittanu
m coḻa māttāṇṭacceri kiḷivalū cakrapāṇi karumāṇikkamum nittavinodac ceri cannakkuṟi civiṣṇukramavittanum Irājakesariceri cannakkuṟit tiruvāruraṭikaḷ kramavittanu coḻacceri kārampicceṭṭu Amutukumārapaṭṭanum kun=tavaicceri vetai komapuṟattu cikumāra kramavittanum ciṅkaḷān=takacceri veṇip pot tu viṣṇukramavittanum coḻakula sun=tarac ceri māvaṇṭur trailokhyanāta paṭṭanum Aḻakiya coḻacceri Āsurik kecavakramavittanum Ivvarum paṇikka Ivvolai Eḻutinen Ikaṭikai madhya[ stan*] nampirān caṅkaranārāyaṇa nāna mulapariṭai brahmapriyanen Ivaiyenneḻuttu Ivolai Eḻuti neṉ kavaṭikai madhyastan nampippirāṉcivaṉ vaikhāsanaṉ śrīmādhavaṉ tāmeṉen Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ivvūr vai Incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 25.294 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
